title: protium divaricatum subsp. fumarium
intro: Protium divaricatum subsp. fumarium, also known as the fumarin resin tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Burseraceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Protium divaricatum subsp. fumarium include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antifungal and antibacterial activities. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
